ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let data = JSON.parse(result).data;

let res = [];

if (data && data.volumeNameList && data.chapterListWithVolume) {
  data.volumeNameList.forEach(volumeName => {
    let chapters = data.chapterListWithVolume.find(chapterList => chapterList[0].volume_name === volumeName);
    if (chapters) {
      res.push({
        name: volumeName,
        url: "",
        vol: true,
        info: ""
      });
      chapters.forEach(c => {
        let cheurl = findContentUrl(c.itemId);
        res.push({
          name: c.title,
          url: cheurl,
          vol: false,
          info: java.timeFormatUTC(parseInt(c.firstPassTime) * 1000, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss', 12)
        });
      });
    }
  });
}
//java.log(JSON.stringify(res, "", "\t"))
res;
</js>

bookSourceComment:
жіЁж„ҸпјҡиҜҘд№ҰжәҗгҖҗе…Ёз«ҷгҖ‘еҗҜз”ЁдәҶ "дәәжңәйӘҢиҜҒ"пјҢеӣ жӯӨдҪҝз”ЁиҝҮзЁӢдёӯпјҲжҗңзҙўгҖҒжҚўд№ҰжәҗгҖҒжӣҙж–°зӣ®еҪ•гҖҒеҠ иҪҪж–°з« иҠӮзӯүпјүеҸҜиғҪдјҡеҮәзҺ°дәәжңәйӘҢиҜҒз•ҢйқўпјҢйҖҡиҝҮеҗҺдёҖж®өж—¶й—ҙеҶ…дёҚдјҡеҶҚйӘҢиҜҒпјҢеҰӮжһңдёҚе–ңж¬ўеҸҜд»ҘзҰҒз”ЁиҜҘд№ҰжәҗгҖӮ
вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”
жҸҗзӨәпјҡеҰӮжһңдҪ йҒҮеҲ°дәҶ дәәжңәйӘҢиҜҒ ж— йҷҗеҫӘзҺҜ жҲ–жҸҗзӨәжҠҘй”ҷзҡ„жғ…еҶөпјҢеҲҷд»ЈиЎЁжҳҜ WebView ж–№йқўжңүй—®йўҳпјҢиҜ·жҢүз…§дёӢж–№жӯҘйӘӨз®ҖеҚ•жҺ’жҹҘпјҡ
 - еҰӮжһңиҜҘд№ҰжәҗзҪ‘з«ҷдҪ еңЁжүӢжңәжөҸи§ҲеҷЁдёҠд№ҹжҳҜж— йҷҗеҫӘзҺҜдәәжңәйӘҢиҜҒпјҢйӮЈд№ҲиҜҙжҳҺжҳҜдҪ зі»з»ҹзҡ„ WebView зүҲжң¬еӨӘдҪҺдәҶпјҢе»әи®®еҚҮзә§еҲ°жңҖе°‘ 11x зүҲжң¬гҖӮ
 - еҰӮжһңиҜҘд№ҰжәҗзҪ‘з«ҷдҪ еңЁжүӢжңәжөҸи§ҲеҷЁиғҪйҖҡиҝҮдәәжңәйӘҢиҜҒпјҢйӮЈд№ҲиҜҙжҳҺжҳҜдҪ жүӢжңәзі»з»ҹ WebView еҶ…ж ёзүҲжң¬дёҺеҪ“еүҚд№ҰжәҗжүҖз”Ёзҡ„ UA дёӯзҡ„ WebView зүҲжң¬дҝЎжҒҜзӣёе·®иҝҮеӨ§пјҢиҜ·е°ҶдёӢж–№зҡ„гҖҗиҜ·жұӮеӨҙгҖ‘и§„еҲҷдёӯ `Chrome/115.0.4664.104` зҡ„ 115 иҝҷдёӘеӨ§зүҲжң¬еҸ·дҝ®ж”№дёәдҪ жүӢжңәзі»з»ҹзҡ„ WebView еҶ…ж ёзүҲжң¬пјҲжҜ”еҰӮдҪ жҳҜ 96.0.x.x йӮЈе°ұе°Ҷ 115 ж”№жҲҗ 96пјҢеҗҺйқўзҡ„е°ҸзүҲжң¬еҸ·дёҚеҪұе“ҚпјүгҖӮ
вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”
жңҖиҝ‘зҰҒжӯўдәҶеӣҪеҶ… IP и®ҝй—®гҖӮгҖӮеӣ жӯӨйңҖиҰҒжҢӮд»ЈзҗҶдҪҝз”ЁдәҶгҖӮ
зҪ‘з«ҷеӨ–и§ӮзңӢзқҖе’Ң 69д№Ұеҗ§ жҢәеғҸпјҢдҪҶе®һйҷ…зҪ‘йЎөз»“жһ„е…ғзҙ д»Җд№Ҳзҡ„дёҚдёҖж ·пјҢдј°и®ЎжҳҜдёӘи№ӯеҗҚеӯ—зҡ„пјҹдёҚиҝҮжҲ‘жүҫдәҶеҮ жң¬иҝһиҪҪзҡ„д№ҰзңӢдәҶдёӢжӯЈж–ҮеҶ…е®№еҖ’жҳҜеҹәжң¬дёҖж ·пјҢеҸҜиғҪжҳҜзҲ¬зҡ„ 69д№Ұеҗ§пјҹжүҖд»Ҙд№ҹдёҚеҝ…еңЁд№ҺжҳҜзңҹжҳҜеҒҮдәҶпјҢиғҪз”Ёе°ұиЎҢ
еҸҰеӨ–пјҢиҜҘзҪ‘з«ҷй»ҳи®ӨжҳҜз№ҒдҪ“зҡ„пјҢзҪ‘йЎөеҠ иҪҪе®ҢжҲҗеҗҺдјҡжү§иЎҢ JS ж №жҚ®жөҸи§ҲеҷЁиҜӯиЁҖиҪ¬дёәз®ҖдҪ“пјҢдҪҶд№ҰжәҗжҳҜйңҖиҰҒжүӢеҠЁиҪ¬зҡ„пјҢдёҚиҝҮжҲ‘д№ҹзңӢдәҶпјҢиҝҷзҪ‘з«ҷй»ҳи®Өзҡ„з№ҒдҪ“е…¶е®һд№ҹжҳҜзӣҙжҺҘжңәеҷЁз®Җз№ҒиҪ¬жҚўзҡ„пјҲжҜ•з«ҹиҝҷдәӣе°ҸиҜҙжң¬иә«йғҪжҳҜз®ҖдҪ“еҸ‘еёғзҡ„пјүпјҢжүҖд»ҘиҪ¬жҚўеӣһжқҘеҗҺе°ұе’Ңе°ҸиҜҙжң¬иә«еҶ…е®№дёҖж ·дәҶгҖӮ

<js>
function setArgument(key, value) {
    var open_argument = source.getVariable();
    open_argument = getArguments(open_argument, '') || {};
    open_argument[key] = value;
    var result = JSON.stringify(open_argument);
    source.setVariable(result);
    return result;
}

var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || 'з”·йў‘';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'tab') || 'е°ҸиҜҙ';
var sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'sources') || 'з•ӘиҢ„';


var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['жүӢеҠЁеЎ«еҶҷз•ӘиҢ„token(еҸҜдёҚеЎ«)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie) {
    java.toast('жӮЁиҝҳжңӘзҷ»йҷҶз•ӘиҢ„иҙҰеҸ·пјҢж— жі•еҗҢжӯҘж•°жҚ®е“ҰпјҒ');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];

function deviceType() {
    try {
        return !!java.androidId();
    } catch (e) {
        return false;
    }
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("з•ӘиҢ„зҷ»еҪ•иҝҮжңҹпјҢе·Ійҡҗи—Ҹз•ӘиҢ„д№Ұжһ¶"+fqssionid);
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("жӯЈеңЁеҠ иҪҪеҲҶз»„ж•°жҚ®...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : 'жңӘзҹҘз”ЁжҲ·';
        if (!userName.includes('жңӘзҹҘз”ЁжҲ·')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "з•ӘиҢ„дёӘдәәдёӯеҝғ",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "дёӘжҖ§жҺЁиҚҗ(з•ӘиҢ„)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "еҺҶеҸІйҳ…иҜ»(з•ӘиҢ„)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("з•ӘиҢ„зҷ»еҪ•иҝҮжңҹпјҢе·Ійҡҗи—Ҹз•ӘиҢ„д№Ұжһ¶");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("еҸ‘зҺ°ж ·ејҸиҺ·еҸ–еӨұиҙҘ");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url+'/get_book_shelf,'+qtop
let qtsj = [{
                title: "жҷҙеӨ©дёӘдәәдёӯеҝғ",
                url: qtsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }]
var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

let config = (() => {
    try {
        let cfg = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())[0] || {};
        if (!cfg.host || !cfg.gender) {
            cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
            source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
            java.toast("й…ҚзҪ®еҲқе§ӢеҢ–е®ҢжҲҗ");
        }
        return cfg;
    } catch(e) {
        let cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
        source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
        return cfg;
    }
})();
    
let rawVariable = source.getVariable();
let дёӘдәәдёӯеҝғ = 1;
let obj = (title, url, type) => ({
  title: title,
  url: url,
  style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: type }
});

let sort = [];
let push = (title, url, type) => sort.push(obj(title, url, type));

let currentType = "";
let currentSource = "";
try {

  if (vArray.length > 0) {
    let v = vArray[0];
    currentType = v.gender || "";
    currentSource = v.source || "";
  }
} catch(e) {
  currentType = "";
  currentSource = "";
}

const getGenderDisplayName = (gender) => {
  if (gender == "boy") return "з”·йў‘";
  if (gender == "girl") return "еҘійў‘";
  return "";
};

const genderDisplay = getGenderDisplayName(currentType);

push(`еҪ“еүҚдёәгҖҗ${currentSource || "з•ӘиҢ„е°ҸиҜҙ"}гҖ‘${genderDisplay ? `гҖҗ${genderDisplay}гҖ‘` : ''}`, "", 1);

const excludedSources = ["е°ҸиҜҙ", "еҗ¬д№Ұ", "жј«з”»", "и§Ҷйў‘", "зҹӯеү§", "йҹійў‘","з•ӘиҢ„е°ҸиҜҙ"];

if (currentSource && !excludedSources.includes(currentSource)) {
  try {
    let apiUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}`;
    if (currentType) {
      apiUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
    }
    
    let response = JSON.parse(java.ajax(apiUrl));
    
    if (response.data && response.data.found) {
      response.data.found.forEach(item => {
        let finalUrl = "";
        if (item.url) {
          finalUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}&page={{page}}&url=${item.url}`;
          if (currentType) {
            finalUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
          }
        }
        sort.push({
          title: item.title,
          url: finalUrl,
          style: item.style || { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
        });
      });
    } else {
      push(`гҖҗ${currentSource}гҖ‘${genderDisplay ? `гҖҗ${genderDisplay}гҖ‘` : ''}жҡӮж— ж•°жҚ®`, "", 1);
    }
  } catch(e) {
    push(`гҖҗ${currentSource}гҖ‘${genderDisplay ? `гҖҗ${genderDisplay}гҖ‘` : ''}жҡӮж— ж•°жҚ®`, "", 1);
  }
  JSON.stringify(sort);

              fqCategoryArr.push({

    }
  });

  fqCategoryArr.forEach(item => {
  if (item.style && item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent) {
    push(item.title, item.url, item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent);
  } else {
    sort.push({
      title: item.title,
      url: item.url,
      style: {
        layout_flexGrow: 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29
      }
    });
  }
});

push('вқӨпёҸ'+tit1+'вқӨпёҸ', null, 1);

<js>
function getBookIdFull(url) {
    const {java} = this;
    let $ = JSON.parse(url).data;
    let arr = [];
    if ($.book_shelf_info && $.book_shelf_info.length > 0) {
        arr = $.book_shelf_info.map(item => item.book_id);
    } else if ($.data_list && $.data_list.length > 0) {
        arr = $.data_list.map(item => item.book_id_str);
    } else {
        java.toast("иҺ·еҸ– book_id еӨұиҙҘпјҢдҪ еҸҜиғҪйңҖиҰҒзҷ»еҪ•пјҒ");
    }
    return arr;
}

let session = getSessionId()

getShelf = () => {
    let book_shelf_info = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_shelf?session=" + session)
    
    bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info)
    
    let id_list = splitArray(bid, 200)
    let urls = []
    id_list.forEach(i => {
        urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(",") + "&sessionid=" + session)
    })
    res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

    let resp = {book_info: []}
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
    })

    return resp
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
    let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(getServerHost() +"/book_shelf?session=" + session))
    
    let group_bookids = {
        "жңӘеҲҶз»„": []
    }
    book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
        if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "жңӘеҲҶз»„"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = []
        group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "жңӘеҲҶз»„"].push(i.book_id)
    })
    
    if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []}
    
    let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 200)
    let urls = []

    book_ids.forEach(i => { 	urls.push("https://api5-normal-sinfonlineb.fqnovel.com/reading/bookapi/multi-detail/v/?aid=1967&iid=1&version_code=999&book_id=" + i.join(","))
    })
    
    res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

    let resp = {book_info: []}
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
    })

    return resp
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
    let url = _mlsec.requestHeader(
        "bookmall/tab",
        "version_name=5.8.9.32",
        null,
        "sessionid=" + session
    )
    let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url))
    let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index].cell_data
    if (!tab) tab = []
    let bookList = []
    for (let i of tab) {
        bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data)
    }
    return { book_info: bookList }
}

function normalizeResponse(data) {
    if (data.book_info) return data.book_info;
    if (data.data && data.data.book_info) return data.data.book_info;
    if (data.data && Array.isArray(data.data)) return data.data;
    if (data.list) return data.list;
    if (data.book_list) return data.book_list;
    if (data.data && data.data.publication_list) return data.data.publication_list;
    if (data.result) return data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.result) return data.data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.cell_view && data.data.cell_view.book_data) {
        return data.data.cell_view.book_data;
    }
    if (data.data && data.data.records) return data.data.records;
    if (data.data && data.data.list) return data.data.list;
    return [];
}

if (baseUrl.includes("type_style")) {
    let sortKey = getSortKey();
    if (sortKey && sortKey !== "") {
        let newUrl = baseUrl.replace(/selected_items=[^&]*/, `selected_items=${sortKey}`);
        if (!newUrl.includes("selected_items=")) {
            if (newUrl.includes("?")) {
                newUrl += `&selected_items=${sortKey}`;
            } else {
                newUrl += `?selected_items=${sortKey}`;
            }
        }
        result = JSON.parse(java.ajax(newUrl));
    } else {
        result = JSON.parse(java.ajax(baseUrl));
    }
    
    let normalizedData = normalizeResponse(result);
    JSON.stringify({data: normalizedData});
} else if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) {
    result = getShelf("bookshelf/info")
} else if(/read_history/.test(baseUrl)) {
    let pageMatch = baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/);
    let page = pageMatch ? pageMatch[1] : '1';
    
    let history_response = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/read_history?session=" + session + "&page=" + page)
    let history_data = JSON.parse(history_response)
    
    if (history_data.data && history_data.data.data_list) {
        let book_ids = history_data.data.data_list.map(item => item.book_id_str)
        
        let id_list = splitArray(book_ids, 200)
        let urls = []
        id_list.forEach(i => {
            urls.push("https://api5-normal-sinfonlineb.fqnovel.com/reading/bookapi/multi-detail/v/?aid=1967&iid=1&version_code=999&book_id=" + i.join(","))
        })
        
        let resp = {book_info: []}
        urls.forEach(url => {
            let detailResponse = java.ajax(url)
            let detailData = JSON.parse(detailResponse)
            if (detailData.data) {
                resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(detailData.data)
            }
        })
        
        result = resp
    } else {
        result = {book_info: []}
    }
} else {
    let w = baseUrl.split("/")
    if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
        result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1])
    } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
        result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]))
    } else {
        result = JSON.parse(result)
        if (result.data && result.data.data) {
            result = {book_info: result.data.data}
        }
    }
}

if (!baseUrl.includes("jjbookshelf") && !baseUrl.includes("type_style")) {
    let normalizedData = normalizeResponse(result);
    JSON.stringify({data: normalizedData})
}

<js>
let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
let catalog = {
    source: res.source,
    url: res.url,
    name: res.name,
    tab: res.tab || "novel"
};

var tabTips = {audio: 'еҗ¬д№Ұ', video: 'и§Ҷйў‘', comic: 'жј«з”»'}; 
if (tabTips[catalog.tab]) {
    java.toast('еҪ“еүҚдёә' + tabTips[catalog.tab] + 'жЁЎејҸ');
}

let op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: {
        source: catalog.source,
        url: res.url,
        name: res.name
    }
};

let catalogUrl = getServerHost() + `/catalog,${JSON.stringify(op)}`;
let response = java.ajax(catalogUrl);

let device = deviceType() ? 'android' : 'ios';
if (device == 'android') {
    var typeMap = {audio:32, comic:64};
    book.type = catalog.tab in typeMap ? typeMap[catalog.tab] : 8;
} else {
    var typeMap = {audio:1, comic:2, video:3};
    book.type = catalog.tab in typeMap ? typeMap[catalog.tab] : 0;
}

JSON.parse(response).data.map((x) => {
    if (x.isVolume == true) {
        x.url = "";
        return x;
    }
    
    const isFanqieApp = ['з•ӘиҢ„е°ҸиҜҙ', 'з•ӘиҢ„зҹӯеү§', 'з•ӘиҢ„еҗ¬д№Ұ', 'з•ӘиҢ„з•…еҗ¬'].includes(catalog.source);
    const urlToMatch = x.url || catalog.url;
    const bookId = urlToMatch.match(/book_id=(\d+)\b/)?.[1] || null;
    const itemId = urlToMatch.match(/item_id=(\d+)/)?.[1] || null;
    
    let contentUrlParams = `chapter?cid=${x.cid}&source=${catalog.source}&device=${device}`;
    
    if (!isFanqieApp) {
        contentUrlParams += `&url=${catalog.url}`;
    } else {
        contentUrlParams += `&book_id=${bookId}&item_id=${itemId}`;
        
        if (['з•ӘиҢ„еҗ¬д№Ұ', 'з•ӘиҢ„з•…еҗ¬'].includes(catalog.source)) {
            const toneId = Number((source.getLoginInfoMap())['еҗ¬д№ҰAIйҹіиүІзј–еҸ·']) || 1;
            contentUrlParams += `&tone_id=${toneId}`;
        }
    }
    
    if (catalog.source == 'дёғзҢ«') {
        const qmBookId = x.url.match(/book_id=(\d+)/)?.[1] || null;
        const qmChapterId = x.url.match(/item_id=(\d+)/)?.[1] || null;
        
        contentUrlParams += `&${x.url}`;
        
        if (qmBookId && qmChapterId) {
            const qmCommentUrl = `${getServerHost()}/qm_comment?book_id=${qmBookId}&item_id=${qmChapterId}`;
            x.url = `data:contentUrl;base64,${java.base64Encode(contentUrlParams)},{"type":"shushan","js":"book ? result : '${qmCommentUrl}'"}`;
        } else {
            x.url = `data:contentUrl;base64,${java.base64Encode(contentUrlParams)},{"type":"shushan"}`;
        }
    } else {
        let commentPart = '{"type":"shushan"}';
        
        if (catalog.source == 'з•ӘиҢ„е°ҸиҜҙ') {
            const fanqieCommentUrl = `${getServerHost()}/comment?sessionid=${getSessionId()}&item_id=${itemId}&book_id=${bookId}`;
            commentPart = `{"type":"shushan","js":"book ? result : '${fanqieCommentUrl}'"}`;
        }
        
        x.url = `data:contentUrl;base64,${java.base64Encode(contentUrlParams)},${commentPart}`;
    }
    
    return x;
});

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : 'жңӘзҹҘз”ЁжҲ·';
        if (!userName.includes('жңӘзҹҘз”ЁжҲ·')) {

}

            nickname = 'ж¬ўиҝҺеӣһжқҘпјҡ' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = 'ж¬ўиҝҺеӣһжқҘпјҡ' + user_info.email + "(иҜ·еүҚеҫҖз”ЁжҲ·еҗҺеҸ°и®ҫзҪ®з”ЁжҲ·еҗҚ)"

    if (key) {
        nickname = 'иҙҰеҸ·зҠ¶жҖҒпјҡе·Ізҷ»еҪ•'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "вқҮпёҸв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҮпёҸв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҮпёҸ";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || 'жңӘејҖе§Ӣ';
let info = `
    рҹ“Ў еҪ“еүҚжңҚеҠЎпјҡ${base_url}
    рҹ”‘ ${loginStatus}
    рҹҸ· ж•°жҚ®жқҘжәҗпјҡ${sources}
    рҹ”„ еҪ“еүҚжЁЎејҸпјҡ${tab}

    рҹ“– йҳ…иҜ»иҮіпјҡ${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "еҗ¬д№Ұ") {
    let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    рҹҺө йҹіиүІй…ҚзҪ®пјҡ${toneId}
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "д№ҰзұҚеҲҶзұ»пјҡ", "рҹҢҲ");
addBasicInfo(role, "д№ҰзұҚдё»и§’пјҡ", "рҹ‘‘");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "жңҖж–°з« иҠӮпјҡ", "рҹ“ҡ");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "жӣҙж–°ж—¶й—ҙпјҡ", "вҸі");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "д№ҰзұҚеӯ—ж•°пјҡ", "рҹ“Ҡ");
addBasicInfo(status, "д№ҰзұҚзҠ¶жҖҒпјҡ", "рҹҡ©");
addBasicInfo(score, "д№ҰзұҚиҜ„еҲҶпјҡ", "вӯҗ");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    рҹ“– д№ҰзұҚз®Җд»Ӣпјҡ
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    В© ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    рҹ’ рҹ’ рҹ’  ж•°жҚ®жӣҙж–°дәҺ ${new Date().toLocaleString()} рҹ’ рҹ’ рҹ’ 
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "on") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "жңҖж–°з« иҠӮпјҡ", "рҹ“ҡ");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "жӣҙж–°ж—¶й—ҙпјҡ", "вҸі");

    addBasicInfo(status, "д№ҰзұҚзҠ¶жҖҒпјҡ", "рҹҡ©");
    addBasicInfo(score, "д№ҰзұҚиҜ„еҲҶпјҡ", "вӯҗ");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {

            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    рҹ“– д№ҰзұҚз®Җд»Ӣпјҡ
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\nрҹҸ· ж•°жҚ®жқҘжәҗпјҡ${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}

if (device_type == "е®үеҚ“" && (tab == "зҹӯеү§" || tab == "и§Ҷйў‘" || sources == 'жҜ’иҲҢеҪұи§Ҷ')) {

}

} else if (tab == "жј«з”»") {

            }

                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;

                        }

                            }
                            try {

                            }
                        }

}

    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("xпјҡ")) {
    media = "е°ҸиҜҙ"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

                resultData.publication_list || resultData.result || resultData;

    let booksData = java.ajax(
`https://fanqienovel.com/api/bookshelf/multidetail,{"method": "post","body": {"books":[${bookIds}]}}`
        );

            word_number:d.word_number,
            lastChapterTitle: d.last_chapter_title,
            abstract: d.abstract,
            book_id: d.book_id,
        });
    }
} else {
    list = targetData.content || targetData;
}

JSON.stringify({data: list})

<js>

getShelf = () => {
let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700'
let book_shelf_info = java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
  headers: {
    'Cookie': ck
  }
}))

bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info)
let id_list = splitArray(bid, 100)
let urls = []
id_list.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(xGorgon("multi-detail", "book_id=" + i.join(","), null, ck))
})

res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

let resp = {book_info: []}
res.forEach(r => {
  resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
})

return resp
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
  let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700'

  let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
    headers: {
      'Cookie': ck,
    }
  })))
  let group_bookids = {
    "жңӘеҲҶз»„": []
  }
  // java.log(
  book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
    if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "жңӘеҲҶз»„"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = []
    group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "жңӘеҲҶз»„"].push(i.book_id)
  })
  // java.log(JSON.stringify(group_bookids["жңӘеҲҶз»„"]))
  // java.log(decodeURIComponent(name))
  if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []}
  //java.log("awa")
  let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 100)
  let urls = []

  book_ids.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(xGorgon("multi-detail", "book_id=" + i.join(","), null, ck))
  })
  
  res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

  let resp = {book_info: []}
  res.forEach(r => {
    resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
  })

  return resp
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
  let url = xGorgon(
	  "bookmall/tab",
    "version_name=5.8.9.32&device_id=1024&device_type=114514&iid=2048",
	  null,
	  ck
  )
  let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url))
  let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index]
  // java.log(JSON.stringify(tab))
  tab = tab.cell_data
  if (!tab) tab = []
  let bookList = []
  for (let i of tab) {
    bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data)
    // java.log(JSON.stringify(i.book_data))
  }
  return { book_info: bookList }
}

if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) result = getShelf("bookshelf/info")
else {
  let w = baseUrl.split("/")
  if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
    result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1])
  } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
    result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]))
  } else result = JSON.parse(result)
}
JSON.stringify({data: result.book_info || result.data.book_info || result.detail_list || result.data.video_info || result.data})
</js>

searchUrl:
<js>
var url = 'https://m.22biqu.com';
var html = java.ajax(url + ",{'webView': true}");
var doc = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(html);
var form = doc.select('form[action]:not([name~=login]):not([class~=login]):not([id~=login])')[0];
var method = form.attr('method');
var action = form.attr('action');
var charset = doc.select('head>meta[charset]').attr('charset');
if (charset == '') {
    charset = String(doc.select('head>meta[content~=charset=]').attr('content')).replace(/^.*charset=([a-z0-9\-]+).*$/i, '$1');
}
var uaw = "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/131.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36";
var headers = {
    "User-Agent": uaw,
    "Referer": String('https://m.22biqu.com')
};
url = 'https://m.22biqu.com/' + String(action).replace(/^\//, '');
var body = '';
var option = {};
var sk = form.select('input[name][type="text"],input[name][class="text"]').attr('name');
var es = form.select('input[name]:not([type="submit"])');
for (var it in es) {
    var e = es[it];
    var k = e.attr('name');
    var v = e.attr('value');
    if (k == sk) {
        body += sk + '={{key}}&';
    } else {
        body += k + '=' + v + '&';
    }
}
es = form.select('select[name]');
for (it in es) {
    var e = es[it];
    var k = e.attr('name');
    var v = e.select('option')[0].attr('value');
    body += k + '=' + v + '&';
}
body = String(body).replace(/&$/, '');
if (method.match(/post/i)) {
    option = {
        "charset": String(charset),
        "method": String(method),
        "body": String(body),
        "headers": headers,
        "webView": true
    };
    url += ',' + JSON.stringify(option);
} else {
    option = {
        "charset": String(charset),
        "headers": headers,
        "webView": true
    };
    url += '?' + body + ',' + JSON.stringify(option);
}
url;
</js>

<js>
var type = java.get("type");
var item_id = java.hexDecodeToString(result);

if (type == '3') {
    url = getHost() + '/content?book_id=' + java.get('book_id') + '&item_id=' + item_id + '&tab=е°ҸиҜҙ&source=з•ӘиҢ„'; 
    var response = java.ajax(url);
    var json = JSON.parse(response);
    if (json.success && json.data && json.data.length > 0) {
        result = json.data[0].content;
    } else {
        result = 'гҖҗеҠ иҪҪеӨұиҙҘгҖ‘жңӘиҺ·еҸ–еҲ°еҶ…е®№ж•°жҚ®';
    }
}
if (type == '2') {
    try {
        var value = JSON.parse(source.getVariable());
        var tone = value.tone;
    } catch (error) {
        var tone = "";
    }
    url = getHost() + '/content?book_id=' + java.get('book_id') + '&item_id=' + item_id + '&tab=жңүеЈ°&source=з•ӘиҢ„' + (tone ? '&' + tone : '');
    var response = java.ajax(url);
    var json = JSON.parse(response);
    if (json.success && json.data && json.data.length > 0) {
        result = json.data[0].content;
    } else {
        result = 'гҖҗеҠ иҪҪеӨұиҙҘгҖ‘жңӘиҺ·еҸ–еҲ°йҹійў‘ж•°жҚ®';
    }
}
if (type == '8') {
    url = getHost() + '/content?book_id=' + java.get('book_id') + '&item_id=' + item_id + '&tab=жј«з”»&source=з•ӘиҢ„'; 
    var response = java.ajax(url);
    var json = JSON.parse(response);
    if (json.success && json.data && json.data.length > 0) {
        result = json.data[0].content;
    } else {
        result = 'гҖҗеҠ иҪҪеӨұиҙҘгҖ‘жңӘиҺ·еҸ–еҲ°еҶ…е®№ж•°жҚ®';
    }
}
if (type == '11') {
    url = getHost() + '/content?book_id=' + java.get('book_id') + '&tab=и§Ҷйў‘&source=з•ӘиҢ„&player=y'; 
    java.log(url);
    java.startBrowser(url, "");
    result = `гҖҗеҲ·ж–°жӯЈж–ҮгҖ‘ж’ӯж”ҫ`
}
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
gender=baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)[1]:""
category_id=baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_filters=baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)[1]:""
page=baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_category=baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)[1]:""
tag_id=baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'
headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
headers['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))


var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {
  if(param==null) return '';
  var paramStr = '';
  var t = typeof (param);
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);
  } else {
    for (var i in param) {
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);
    }
  }
  return paramStr;
};

var category = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'category_id':category_id,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'need_category':need_category}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/category/get-list?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};

var tag = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'tag_id':tag_id}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/tag/index?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};

<js>
gender=baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)[1]:""
category_id=baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_filters=baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)[1]:""
page=baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_category=baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)[1]:""
tag_id=baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'
headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
headers['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))


var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {
  if(param==null) return '';
  var paramStr = '';
  var t = typeof (param);
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);
  } else {
    for (var i in param) {
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);
    }
  }
  return paramStr;
};

var category = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'category_id':category_id,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'need_category':need_category}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/category/get-list?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};

var tag = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'tag_id':tag_id}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/tag/index?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};


if(baseUrl.match(/category/)){
  category()
}else {
  tag()
}
</js>
